title: Convention Profile Report
description: Produced by codebase-convention-profiler. Compares observed naming patterns and docstring style against the active language profile's `conventions` block. Lists per-file deviations plus aggregate conformance percentages by kind. Consumed by codebase-architecture-reconstructor and /setup.

primary_language.description: Profile name from <project>/.language_profile.json. Null when no stamp is present or the stamp is the no-match sentinel — in which case `deviations` is empty and `notes` explains the skip.

conformance_by_kind.description: Map of convention kind (e.g. 'functionNaming') to conformance ratio in [0, 1], rounded to two decimal places. Only kinds the profile declared and the scanner could measure appear here.

file.description: Project-relative path of the file containing the deviating identifier.

line.description: 1-based line number of the deviating identifier (or 1 for fileNaming deviations).

kind.description: Which conventions-block field the deviation pertains to.

name.description: The deviating identifier (or filename basename, without extension, for fileNaming deviations).

observed.description: Detected naming style. 'mixed' covers identifiers that fit none of the canonical styles.

expected.description: The naming style declared by the active language profile for this kind. Mirrors profile.schema.json's NamingStyle enum (without the 'mixed' value, which is observation-only).
